title: Velvety Irish Almonds Salad
description: A nutty, velvety salad that blends Irish greens, tandoor‑roasted almonds, and a dry white wine‑infused yogurt dressing for a high‑protein, light meal.
instructions: Preheat your tandoor or conventional oven to 200°C (390°F).
Spread the almonds on a baking sheet, drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil, and season with salt and pepper. Roast in the tandoor for 5–7 minutes until golden and fragrant.
While almonds roast, soak the kale in cold water, shake off excess, and place in a large bowl.

In a small saucepan, combine the dry white wine, minced garlic, honey, and tandoor‑roasted paprika. Heat gently until the mixture reduces by half, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Whisk the Greek yogurt with the lemon juice, reduced wine mixture, and chopped dill until smooth.
Add the roasted almonds to the kale, pour the dressing over, and toss gently to coat everything evenly.
Season the salad with additional salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately over a bed of fresh kale or pair with a slice of Irish brown bread.
